name: Compass Search Scorer Test Data
description: Test corpus and query fixtures for the compass search scoring model. The corpus contains JSON representations of org-roam documents (one file per document). The queries file contains test scenarios with pre-computed DocSignals and pairwise relevance assertions. Together they let the test suite evaluate whether scoring model changes improve or regress retrieval quality without requiring a live database.

sources.name: OreStudio org-roam vault
sources.description: Documents sampled from the live OreStudio knowledge base. Converted to JSON via tests/scripts/build_corpus.py. Signals collected from the live SQLite FTS5 index via the debug procedure in methodology.txt.

datasets.name: Corpus Documents
datasets.description: One JSON file per document in tests/data/corpus/. Format mirrors doc_index.Doc — the exact representation compass.py passes to the scorer. Generated by tests/scripts/build_corpus.py from org files.

datasets.name: Query Fixtures
datasets.description: Test queries with pre-computed DocSignals and pairwise relevance assertions. References corpus document IDs. See methodology.txt for how to add queries and refresh signals.
